steps.title: Support the broad claim
steps.content: The first sentence says KDKO plays an important role in serving the local Dakota-speaking community. The second sentence gives concrete details about that service: local news, music, and programming in Dakota.

steps.title: Reject illogical shifts
steps.content: Choice A signals replacement, but the second sentence supports the first. Choice C signals a result, though the broadcasts are examples of the service. Choice D signals contrast despite an obstacle, which is not present. The answer is B.
